title: pilosella pumila
intro: Pilosella pumila, also known as Dwarf Ragwort, is a small perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health benefits such as immune system support, digestive health, and skin care. Pilosella pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from a range of health concerns.
